phases.title: Stabilize SIH Baseline
phases.goal: Make the active simulator boring to build and easy to reproduce.

phases.title: Prove Lander Hover Window
phases.goal: Validate the first required lander scenario in SIH before expanding scope.

phases.title: Replace Provisional Physical Data
phases.goal: Manifests represent the real vehicles closely enough for simulation and control design.

phases.title: Propulsion And Load-Cell Semantics
phases.goal: Flight software sees motor state the same way in SIH, bench tests, and flight.

phases.title: Control Mixer
phases.goal: Requested torque and net thrust become reachable, bounded engine commands.

phases.title: Guidance And Monte Carlo
phases.goal: Guidance only claims a solution when the remaining vehicle envelope can execute it.

phases.title: Bench And Hardware Gates
phases.goal: Real sensors and outputs behave like the simulated interfaces.
